scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix apps/api-nest run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/admin-next run typecheck
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/api-nest run build && npm --prefix apps/admin-next run build
scripts.audit:all: npm --prefix apps/api-nest audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix apps/admin-next audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix apps/video-renderer audit --audit-level=high
